summary.en: libcurl bindings with both high-level Lua helpers and low-level native bindings.
summary.zh: 同时包含高层 Lua 辅助与低层 native 绑定的 libcurl 包。

en: Package-level metadata helps avoid treating every helper file as a standalone library.
The official Windows override is generated from a parameterized template.
zh: 包级元数据可以避免把每个辅助文件都误判成独立库。
官方 Windows override 由参数化模板生成。
